entries.setup: 5 clips · overhead · indoor track mat · Phantom 7.5
entries.finding: Tempo now ≈2:1 ✓ (was ~1:1 — the One-Two drill is landing). Path straight (SBST) again. Face stays square through impact on these reps — no visible toe-over. Balls start dead on the center line, no left pull. Early lift can't be judged from overhead.

faults.why: unverified this session — overhead can't see it; film face-on to confirm the fix
the toe-flow mismatch still stands until the zero-torque demo — today's calm reps ran on good timing

entries.text: Film 2–3 strokes face-on + DTL — verify the early-lift fix and the calmer release seen in Session 4
